biological_replicate: Three biological replicates of each group were included.

experimental_design: The cells were divided into the control group (Con), the lobaplatin group (Lob), and the rhIL-6-and-lobaplatin group (IL-6).
factor_value: the control group (Con), the lobaplatin group (Lob), and the rhIL-6-and-lobaplatin group (IL-6)
number_of_technical_replicates: In total, 18 culture dishes were used to establish three replicates per sample.
